narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 5 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1595, T1203, T1059, T1199. Average risk score: 9.9/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1595, T1203, T1078, T1195. Average risk score: 9.7/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 31 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1555, T1199, T1566, T1486, T1059. Average risk score: 9.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-RU-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1475, T1542, T1059, T1203, T1547. Average risk score: 8.7/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 9 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1475, T1486, T1595, T1203. Average risk score: 8.5/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-IR-02 has been observed in 10 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1555, T1199, T1485, T1566, T1059. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1595, T1203, T1059, T1547. Average risk score: 8.2/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 22 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1555, T1199, T1566, T1003.001, T1486. Average risk score: 7.7/10.
Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1059, T1053.005, T1547, T1204.001, T1203. Average risk score: 7.4/10.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3055. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1111, T1595, T1087, T1203. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 7.2/10.
Threat actor CDB-RAN-01 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1486, T1059, T1053.005, T1203. Average risk score: 6.6/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 398 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3098, CVE-2018-25235, CVE-2025-64648, CVE-2026-4993, CVE-2026-1579. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1111, T1555, T1199, T1566, T1071.004. CRITICAL: 65 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.9/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
